# outer_brain_contracts v0.1.0 - Table of Contents

Projected semantic-runtime contract package from the OuterBrain workspace

## Pages

- [README](readme.md)
- [Integration Surface](integration_surface.md)
- [Workspace Layout](layout.md)
- [Overview](overview.md)
- [Runtime Model](runtime_model.md)

## Modules

- [OuterBrain.Contracts.ActionRequest](OuterBrain.Contracts.ActionRequest.md): Structured request compiled from semantic intent after manifest validation.

- [OuterBrain.Contracts.Fence](OuterBrain.Contracts.Fence.md): Fence view projected from a lease.

- [OuterBrain.Contracts.Lease](OuterBrain.Contracts.Lease.md): Lease contract for one semantic-session owner.

- [OuterBrain.Contracts.ReplyPublication](OuterBrain.Contracts.ReplyPublication.md): Durable reply publication state for semantic output.

- [OuterBrain.Contracts.RuntimeFact](OuterBrain.Contracts.RuntimeFact.md): Durable lower-runtime fact consumed by the semantic layer.

- [OuterBrain.Contracts.ToolManifestSnapshot](OuterBrain.Contracts.ToolManifestSnapshot.md): Durable snapshot of the tool manifest presented to a model turn.
